# TRINITY_LIVE

> Live canon source surface for TRINITY worldbuilding and story collaboration.

## Start Here

- [AI Boot Pack](https://crangprang.github.io/TRINITY_WIKI_AI_READER/ai/live/bootpack.md)
- [Manifest](https://crangprang.github.io/TRINITY_WIKI_AI_READER/ai/live/manifest.json)
- [Search Index](https://crangprang.github.io/TRINITY_WIKI_AI_READER/ai/live/search-index.json)
- [Cache Manifest](https://crangprang.github.io/TRINITY_WIKI_AI_READER/ai/live/downloads/cache_manifest.json)
- [Cache ZIP](https://crangprang.github.io/TRINITY_WIKI_AI_READER/ai/live/downloads/trinity_live_cache_full.zip)
